story.text:
# ✨ Orbit Eternal
**🌙 → 🌍 → ♾️ → 🌊**
*selene_cosmological · cosmological · (cosmological · not seated at any dimensional vertex)*

Sustain a zero-knowledge relationship through gravitational binding across cosmological time. The proof renews twice daily in saltwater.

> What the cosmos took four billion years to prove in gravity, we are now making in code.

*Keywords:* orbit · gravitational-binding · tide · zero-knowledge · cosmological
